scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c magenta,cyan "npm run dev -w apps/frontend" "npm run dev -w apps/backend"
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w apps/frontend && npm run lint -w apps/backend
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:fix -w apps/frontend && npm run lint:fix -w apps/backend
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/frontend && npm run build -w apps/backend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w apps/frontend && npm run typecheck -w apps/backend
